Came from midfield to run on nicely into third 1L Newmarket Group 1 1200m. Settled a long way back, in traffic, grew wings late 0.5L William Reid Group 1 1200m. Big chance if he can get the room he needs.

Superb performance for third after getting a long way back 3.1L Geo Ryder Group 1 1500m. Slow start and top effort to grab fifth 7.7L Doncaster Group 1 1600m Soft 7. Won the G1 Futurity last run at this distance. Drawn for soft run.
Rearward, came wide, too much to do 2.9L King Charlesiii Group 1 over 1609m. Behind midfield, wide, kept battling on late 5.2L Empire Rose Group 1 over 1600m. Will be flying home late.

Midfield rail, edged out, gaps came, too good 0.5L Caul Cup Group 1 over 2400m. Midfield, cut through field to seize win 2.8L Melb Cup Group 1 over 3200m Soft 5. Star stayer likely to find a few of these a bit too sharp.

Just off the pace and loomed before tiring, fourth 1.4L Challenge Group 2 1000m. Came with a well timed run but found one better 0.6L T J Smith Group 1 1200m Soft 7. Weight For Age star finally back to what could arguably be his best trip.

Sat on speed, fought on bravely late in the piece 1.8L Bill Ritchie Group 3 1400m. Found 1-1, had nice run, not up to task, vetted ok 6.5L King Charlesiii Group 1 1609m. Has won three of six fresh and loves this trip. Interesting runner.

Midfield however only held that ground to line 2.9L William Reid Group 1 over 1200m. No match for rivals and never progressed into the race from midfield 3.8L T J Smith Group 1 over 1200m Soft 7. Blinkers off first time.

Back, ran on nicely 3.8L Sand Clssc Group 2 over 2400m Soft 6. Encouraging effort to make up so much ground after giving away a big start 2.4L Donc Prel Group 3 over 1500m Soft 6. Tested at this level.

Ran home nicely to win on the line after sitting amongst the leaders 0.4L All- Star Mile Group 1 1600m. Settled midfield not far off the leaders but couldn't make ground 4.9L Aust Cup Group 1 2000m Soft 7. Tough ask back sharply in trip.

10.comments: Fought hard over the final stages into third after sitting behind leaders 2L at Rosehill Gardens Bm88 over 1400m. Positioned ready to pounce and took over late for an easy win 1.8L at Rosehill Gardens Bm88 over 1400m Soft 6.

Solid to the post but looking for further 3.7L Wenonagirl G3 over 1200m. Gave away a big  start and was good through the line 2.1L Emancipatn G2 over 1500m. Down in grade from  last start and looks poised third up.

Applied pressure to the leader but had nothing left at the finish, sixth 2.6L Nat Sprint Listed over 1400m Soft 7. Led, tried hard but was ultimately outclassed into third placing 3.7L at Rosehill Gardens Bm88 over 1400m Soft 6.
Great gallop to fly late for second after getting back in the running 1L Beauford Listed over 2300m. Midfield, even effort 2.4L Atc Cup Listed over 2000m. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade.

Restrained back to midfield always under the pump to run on 4.9L Liverpool Group 3 over 1300m Soft 5. Ran out of energy after leading and giving followers a gallant effort 5.9L St Kingdom Group 3 over 1200m Soft 6. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade.

Disappointing performance when never got warm 3.8L Ajax Group 2 over 1500m. Awesome effort to run on late for fifth after settling a long way in the running 1.2L at Muswellbrook Mwbk Cup over 1500m Soft 5. Proven here at this track/distance.
Slow out, mile back turn, eye catcher late 3.6L Ingham Group 2 over 1600m. Stormed home to win after getting well back in the running 1.2L Summer Cup Group 3 over 2000m. Can win first-up.

Saved best part of the race until very late 2.6L Ajax Group 2 over 1500m. Fought hard over  the final stages into third after sitting behind leaders 2.2L Donc Prel Group 3 over 1500m  Soft 6. Will love getting back to 1400m.
Punched above his weight and was terrific in the spring behind Via Sistina 2.8L Mackinnon  Group 1 over 2000m Heavy 9. Back in grade and draws awkwardly but he looks well placed  here first up.

Trailed the leaders midfield however never improved thereon sixth 11L Aust Day Listed over 2400m. Hard ridden to make ground but ultimately settled too far back 3.7L Pmatta Cup Group 3 over 1900m. Down in grade here so don't dismiss.

Ridden just off the pace and was unlucky not to have won when second 0.1L Belle Turf Group 3 over 1600m. Went forward sitting behind the leaders and was in for the fight tiring for fifth 0.5L at Kembla Grange Provmid Champ over 1400m Soft 7. Warrants respect with second-up stats.

Didn't look suited on testing ground 6.4L at Kensington Prem Prel over 1800m Heavy 9.  Looked to struggle on the heavy ground 7.9L Premiercup G3 over 2000m Heavy 10. Tends  to produce big runs fresh, blinkers again.

Produced a fast finish to win after looking hopeless at the 400m 0.3L Nat Sprint Listed over 1400m Soft 7. Stormed home from well back to fill the third placing in a fantastic last 600m 0.7L at Muswellbrook Mwbk Cup over 1500m Soft 5.
Dominant when leading all the way 2L at Wyong Bm100 over 1350m. Trials have been  superb in the lead up to this, he boasts great first up stats and loves this trip. Expect him to  run well.

Leader's back, no match when they sprinted 19.6L Hollindale Group 2 over 1800m Heavy 9. Weakened out of the race after doing a lot of chasing 5.1L Spear Chief Listed over 1500m Soft 5. Like chances back to this level.
Non-competitive and never gave backers any joy 5.7L at Royal Randwick Bm100 over 1400m. Hardly sighted until very late gaining sixth 4.6L at Wyong The Lakes over 1600m. Has won first-up, consider.
3rd the rail, kept rolling, run ended 200m out 3.2L Five Diamonds Listed over 1800m. Back, well held 8L Festival Group 3 over 1500m. Has won first-up, consider.

Settled on the pace and ran down the leaders to win 0.1L at Kembla Grange Lillye - Bm94 over 1200m Soft 7. Ran on ok for sixth after settling midfield in transit 3L at Rosehill Gardens Bm94 over 1100m Soft 6.

Ran out of energy after leading and giving followers a great sight 1.7L at Rosehill Gardens Bm94 over 1400m. Hardly sighted and under heavy pressure to make ground from settling position 14.8L St Kingdom Group 3 over 1200m Soft 6. Is a second-up winner.
Won after sitting on the pace and getting the advantage late 0.9L at Wyong Bm78 over 1350m Soft 6. Edged out rivals to win after sitting on pace 0.9L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1400m Soft 5.
